tags.name: Building Search
tags.description: Building search with filtering, sorting and pagination

tags.name: application-process-api-endpoint
tags.description: Document Process API deals with all aspects of document state change and handles business process and document lifecycle events. This could mean updating current document to invalid state or creating a new version of the document as the document has received new information from the court system or employees have reviewed the document and its not relevant in its current state.
